category_sources: Official GitHub README describes the gist command for uploading content to GitHub Gist.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line utility for uploading Gists.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses gist(1) and the command name gist.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes synopsis, installation, command usage, login, library, and configuration sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/defunkt/gist; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository language listing identifies Ruby as the primary implementation language.
source_facts.description and official README identify it as a terminal command for uploading to GitHub Gist.
